title: The Escape Plan Tightens
description: On pages 11–13, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, G-5 Marines, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is the escape plan tightens.
scene: The scene focuses on the escape plan tightens, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, G-5 Marines, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: IF YOU HAVEN'T EATEN ANYTHING IN DAYS...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I recommend starting slowly, with the soup.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: My stomach... is doing just fine!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What's this!? My strength is retur- ning!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But it's alright now, that it is!!

summary: The Escape Plan Tightens. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
